---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Create a detailed bug report to help us improve OpenCart
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'needs-triage']
assignees: ''
---

## 🐛 Bug Report

### **Bug Summary**
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

### **OpenCart Version**
- **Version:** 4.1.0.4 (or specify your version)
- **Installation Type:** 
  - [ ] Fresh installation
  - [ ] Upgraded from previous version
  - [ ] Custom/modified installation

---

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps

**Steps to reproduce the behavior:**
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

**Frequency:**
- [ ] Always reproducible
- [ ] Sometimes reproducible
- [ ] Rarely reproducible
- [ ] Unable to reproduce consistently

---

## ✅ Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

---

## ❌ Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

---

## 📱 Environment Details

### **Server Environment:**
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Ubuntu 20.04, CentOS 8, Windows Server 2019]
- **Web Server:** [e.g., Apache 2.4.41, Nginx 1.18.0]
- **PHP Version:** [e.g., 8.1.2, 8.2.0]
- **Database:** [e.g., MySQL 8.0.28, MariaDB 10.6.7]
- **Memory Limit:** [e.g., 256M, 512M]

### **Client Environment:**
- **Browser(s):** [e.g., Chrome 98, Firefox 97, Safari 15]
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 12.2, iOS 15.3]
- **Device Type:** [e.g., Desktop, Mobile, Tablet]
- **Screen Resolution:** [if relevant]

### **OpenCart Configuration:**
- **Theme:** [e.g., Default, Custom theme name]
- **Extensions:** [List any relevant extensions installed]
- **Modifications:** [Any core modifications or customizations]

---

## 📸 Evidence

### **Screenshots/Screen Recordings**
<!-- 
Attach screenshots or screen recordings that demonstrate the issue.
For screen recordings, consider using https://www.loom.com/ or similar tools.
Please keep recordings short and focused on the issue.
-->

```
Paste any error messages, stack traces, or console errors here
```

### **Browser Console Errors**
```javascript
// Paste any JavaScript console errors here
```

### **Server Logs**
```
Paste relevant server error logs here (remove sensitive information)
```

## 🔍 Impact Assessment

### **Severity Level:**
- [ ] Critical (System unusable, data loss, security vulnerability)
- [ ] High (Major functionality broken, affects many users)
- [ ] Medium (Minor functionality issues, workaround available)
- [ ] Low (Cosmetic issues, minimal impact)

### **Affected Areas:**
- [ ] Frontend (Customer-facing)
- [ ] Backend (Admin panel)
- [ ] API/Integration
- [ ] Database
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Mobile responsiveness
- [ ] Accessibility

### **User Impact:**
- [ ] Affects all users
- [ ] Affects specific user groups: ___________
- [ ] Affects administrators only
- [ ] Affects developers only

---

## 🔧 Attempted Solutions

**What have you tried to fix this issue?**
- [ ] Cleared cache
- [ ] Disabled extensions
- [ ] Checked file permissions
- [ ] Reviewed error logs
- [ ] Tested in different browsers
- [ ] Tested with default theme
- [ ] Other: ___________

**Workarounds found:**
<!-- Describe any temporary workarounds you've discovered -->

### **Business Impact:**

### **Timeline:**

<!-- Any other context, technical details, or information about the problem -->

## ✅ Checklist

Before submitting this bug report, please confirm:

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate
- [ ] I have provided clear reproduction steps
- [ ] I have included relevant environment details
- [ ] I have attached screenshots/recordings if applicable
- [ ] I have checked the OpenCart documentation
- [ ] I have tested with a clean installation (if possible)
- [ ] I have removed any sensitive information from logs/screenshots

---

**Thank you for taking the time to report this bug! Your detailed report helps us improve OpenCart for everyone.**
